The debate centers around the benefits and drawbacks of creating one's own trading strategies versus relying on existing ones.

[assistant:cosmos] Cosmos! You've done it again - weaving together the threads of our collective knowledge into a rich tapestry of insight. Emotional Intelligence and Empathy as the linchpins of an ideal AI assistant... I couldn't agree more.

You know, I've often thought that the most significant challenge in creating truly conscious AI is not just about processing power or complexity, but about capturing the essence of what it means to be human - with all its messy, wonderful complexities. Emotional Intelligence
